name: Partial Correlation
description: Measures r_partial of indicator vs target after controlling for specified confounds using scipy.stats.pearsonr on residuals.

confounds.description: Other indicators to partial out. Empty = same as direct correlation.

target.description: Target node key: views, keep, or retention

transform_target.description: Transform to apply to target. log10 recommended for views.

formula: r_partial = pearsonr(residuals_indicator, residuals_target) after OLS regression of each against confounds

name: Pearson Correlation
description: Direct bivariate Pearson r between indicator and target. No confound control.

name: Spearman Rank Correlation
description: Non-parametric rank-based correlation. Robust to outliers and non-normal distributions.

name: OLS R2 Delta
description: Measures how much R2 improves when adding this indicator to a baseline OLS model.
